title: Remote - BambooHR Marketplace | Your Favorite Integrated HR Apps
text:
Remote - BambooHR Marketplace | Your Favorite Integrated HR Apps

# Remote

#### Integration Type

One-way via Webhooks and API

#### Direction of Data Flow

BambooHR to Partner App

#### Sync Trigger

It's scheduled to sync at a regular time interval

#### Sync Frequency

Once per hour

## Overview

### Remote

Remote is a global HR platform that helps companies hire, manage, and pay their entire team—empowering them to compete more effectively in the modern global economy. It’s designed for simplicity and built with enterprise-grade compliance. The core products are:

Employer of Record (EOR) - Employ in countries where you don’t have a legal entity, and scale compliantly. *Now available as BambooHR Employer of Record, powered by Remote, embedded directly within the BambooHR platform for a unified global hiring experience.*

Global Payroll - Run payroll effortlessly across borders.

Contractor Management - Hire and pay international contractors without compromising on compliance.

Remote Recruit - Source smarter and hire faster with AI- reach qualified candidates effortlessly and in record time.

Remote API - Seamlessly integrate global HR functionalities into your preferred tools to get more from your people data.

### BambooHR Employer of Record (EOR), powered by Remote.

BambooHR Employer of Record, powered by Remote, enables companies to confidently expand their global workforce without setting up local entities or managing complex international compliance on their own. Fully embedded into the BambooHR platform, this solution offers seamless hiring, onboarding, payroll, and benefits management for employees across the world - eliminating double data entry, reducing risk, and unifying local and global teams. With expert support from Remote and the trusted BambooHR experience, businesses can scale internationally with speed, simplicity, and peace of mind.

### Payroll

A streamlined solution for companies with fully-incorporated legal entities in multiple countr

title: Remotive | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Remotive | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Remotive

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role.

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role. For promotion at no cost, the remotive team curates remote jobs ad-hoc, picking relevant jobs to highlight depending on our audience needs and our editorial schedules. Note that your jobs won't be posted by default, we can only guarantee the publication of paid jobs.

title: RemoFirst
text:
RemoFirst

# RemoFirst

- Home
- Global Payroll
- RemoFirst

#### Integration Type

Two-way via API

#### Direction of Data Flow

BambooHR to Partner App

#### Sync Trigger

An event

#### Sync Frequency

Hiring Events will trigger a data sync. Additionally, time sheets will sync data. Sync will happen daily.

## Discount Packaging

RemoFirst will provide BambooHR customers with 3 months free for the first EOR employee on the RemoFirst platform!

## Overview

RemoFirst enables you to affordably and legally employ anyone anywhere in 185+ countries.

As a global employment platform, RemoFirst helps companies employ and manage international talent without establishing local entities.

As an employer of record (EOR) and global contractor management provider, RemoFirst handles essential employment tasks such as onboarding, payroll processing, tax compliance, and benefits administration for employees in over 185 countries, all at an affordable price.

### Hire and pay in 185+ countries.

RemoFirst offers the largest global footprint, allowing you to hire and pay where your talent lives, without the hassle of setting up an entity.

### Integrated with BambooHR

Seamlessly connect BambooHR and RemoFirst – eliminate double data entry, avoid payroll errors, and scale with confidence.

### Visa services in 85+ countries.

Finding and obtaining the proper visa for your employees can be a long and complicated process — The RemoFirst team handles everything with the one of the largest Visa coverage in the EOR industry, making it quick and easy.

### Dedicated Customer Support

With RemoFirst, you get a named Customer Success Manager who stays with you through your customer journey. In addition we have dedicated hiring and offboarding managers to assist with the most cumbersome parts of the employee lifecycle.

## Integration

### How it works

Seamless Integration Experience:

Real-time onboarding/offboarding trigger when an employee is marked “hired” or “terminated” in BambooHR

title: Let's Talk: Remote Hiring
text:
Teamtailor Presents: HR Pulse, a Remote Hiring webinar
# Let's Talk: Remote Hiring
Join us as we delve deep into the intricacies of remote hiring for Teamtailor's HR Pulse Webinar. Our expert speakers, industry pioneers, and seasoned HR professionals are here to equip you with the tools, insights, and strategies needed to thrive in the digital age of recruitment.
Register Here!
![](https://www.teamtailor.com/assets/api/marketing-site-images/file/HRPULSE_LOGO-1220x504.png)
## Webinar Details
* Wednesday, June 12th, 2024
* 11am PST | 1pm CDT | 2pm EST
* Zoom Webinar
![]()
## What is HR Pulse?
🎯**Tailored Insights:**Gain valuable insights tailored specifically to the challenges and opportunities of remote hiring.
🌐**Global Perspectives:**Explore diverse perspectives from thought leaders across the globe, offering a comprehensive understanding of remote recruitment trends.
💡**Innovative Strategies:**Discover innovative strategies and best practices to streamline your remote hiring process, ensuring efficiency and success.
🔑**Key Learnings:**Uncover key learnings and actionable takeaways that you can implement immediately to elevate your remote recruitment game.
## Our Speakers
![]()
## Stacey Slater
## Senior Manager of Talent, Programs and Operations, Oyster
Stacey is no stranger to global hiring! With nearly a decade in Talent Acquisition, she's expanded teams at Nexmo, Onfido, and Messagebird and now spearheads Oyster’s global TA team to actualize remote hiring visions. As Senior Manager of Talent, Programs, and Operations at Oyster, Stacey is the driving force behind Oyster's hiring strategies and talent programs. With a focus on TA Strategy and leading their Global Talent Acquisition team, she's committed to revolutionizing remote hiring!
* ![](https://www.teamtailor.com/assets/api/logo-images/file/Oyster_Logo_Black_Transparent-400x108.png)
![]()
## Carlos Escutia
## Founder & CEO, GroWrk
Carlos Escutia is the founder and CEO of GroWrk, a leading and global tec

title: Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Naukri India

Naukri’s integration with TeamTailor simplifies the process of posting open requisitions to seamlessly flow from the external ATS system into Naukri.

Naukri.com is India's No. 1 job posting website and to post jobs & hire candidates across Industries, locations & experience levels Our intelligent sourcing API harnesses the power of AI and machine learning to enhance candidate discovery. By tapping into vast, diverse talent pools and leveraging sophisticated algorithms, it identifies and recommends top-tier candidates who align perfectly with your specific job requirements. This proactive approach ensures that your talent acquisition efforts are both comprehensive and efficient.

title: DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent US job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by more than 1600 companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.com to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.com, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the US – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 45 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 1600 companies fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.com Support article: Read more about this package

title: Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor
text:
Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor

May 28, 2026

# Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖

We've upgraded every Teamtailor career site to work seamlessly with AI agents like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Comet, so candidates can find your jobs wherever they search.

Suzan Dil

More and more candidates are letting AI agents do the searching for them. They ask "find me a marketing job in London" and want their agent to come back with real opportunities. To show up in those answers, your career site needs to speak the agents' language. We've got you covered 🚀

Every Teamtailor career site now supports the latest open standards for the agentic web, including llms.txt, AI-friendly robots.txt rules, sitemaps, link headers, markdown content negotiation, and content signals. You don't need to do anything to enable this.

This means AI agents can discover your open roles, read your content and guide candidates straight to your application form, with no extra setup from you. It's live on all career sites today.

We hope you and your future candidates will like this.

❤️ / The Product Team

Check out some more articles that may be of interest!

### Build custom Analytics reports using AI ✨

### Teamtailor Co-pilot can now edit text your way ✨

### Latest integrations: Powering up your recruitment workflow (Dec 2025 – Mar 2026)

- May 25, 2026Just describe the chart you want, and Co-pilot generates it for you.
- Apr 14, 2026Teamtailor's Co-pilot helps you refine text directly in the Job Editor. Apply quick editing actions, or use custom prompts to tailor your job ads.
- Apr 9, 2026We are thrilled to announce new and powerful integrations that have gone live from December to March!

title: Story | Ashby
text:
Story | Ashby

# Ashby’s Story

If you’re reading this, odds are that you already know this: hiring for top tier talent has become exponentially harder and more important in the last 5 - 10 years.

Why is that? I believe there are at least three core reasons worth calling out.

1

First, with the number of high growth and venture backed companies increasing significantly, competition for that top talent is fiercer than ever. Even in the current, cooler market environment, it is still very challenging to hire top talent in many roles.

2

Second, top-tier companies are growing their revenues at rates not seen 5–10 years ago. In these high growth companies talent is the biggest bottleneck. This means that hitting hiring goals has become mission critical, leading recruiting functions to become more strategic and operationally minded.

3

Third, the pandemic era has accelerated many of these trends. Remote hiring has made talent markets more efficient leading to candidates being matched with more companies at a faster pace. It has also made the logistics of interviewing easier, leading to faster interview loops which has further shortened the time that top tier candidates are in-market.

## Carving a Path to Hiring Excellence

As a result excelling at hiring has become a strategic advantage for high growth companies and has led to the rapid maturation of talent functions at top-tier companies. Talent leaders now often have a seat at the table when it comes to some of the most strategic decisions businesses face - namely headcount and organizational planning.

And for early stage founders the ability to hire well has increasingly become an important criteria investors focus on.

While today is a challenging time for many talent teams we strongly believe that the trends set in motion over the last couple of years are here to stay. And we see a lot of talent teams use this time to prepare for the next wave of hiring.

The difference between how recruiting was largely done

title: Global Employment | BambooHR
text:
Global Employment | BambooHR

# Manage Global Teams Without the Complexity

Hire, pay, and support global employees with BambooHR®.

Image source

global-employment-hero

Style

BG solid green

### Why choose BambooHR for global growth?

#### Expand with confidence

No local entities required—hire with speed and confidence in 90+ countries.

#### Payroll solutions around the globe

Pay employees accurately and compliantly, wherever they live.

#### Compliance you can count on

Avoid costly errors and stay ahead of labor laws, taxes, and visa rules.

#### One platform, one source of data

Manage global HR, payroll, and compliance through BambooHR.

## Expand globally, effortlessly

#### EMPLOYER OF RECORD (EOR)

### Onboard global talent without legal hassle

Hire and onboard top global talent, all within BambooHR. With our embedded EOR service powered by Remote, you can skip the hassle of setting up legal entities and let us handle the administrative load, so you can focus on what matters.

#### LOCAL PAYROLL BRIDGE

### Pay people on time, every time—wherever they are

Paying international employees with accuracy and compliance is no small task—make it easier with a single source of data. BambooHR connects with localized payroll partners and leverages regional expertise to ensure timely, compliant payroll across regions.

#### REGIONAL SETTINGS

### Meet compliance and cultural needs across regions

Adjust regional policies and settings in just a few clicks, including regional holidays, date settings, and one of eight languages—French, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, and more—with localized data formats for currencies, phone numbers, and ID types.

#### LOCATION-BASED CUSTOMIZATION

### Tailor your HR policies to fit multiple locations

Tailor time off, holidays, and overtime to your organization and your region on one complete platform. Plus, customize tabs, tables, and fields to fit your needs, so you can stay compliant, support every team, and scale with confidenc

title: See candidate locations & filter by distance to your offices | Teamtailor
text:
See candidate locations & filter by distance to your offices | Teamtailor

Mar 17, 2026

# See candidate locations & filter by distance to your offices

Search and filter candidates based on their location to get a better understanding of your candidates and their availability.

Suzan Dil

We’ve made it easy for candidates to show you where they are and how close they are to your locations 🎉

They can now add their location directly in the job application form or their Connect settings. You’ll also be able to add or edit locations for candidates through the candidate profile or the sourcing extension.

### Filtering by distance

There's now a new filter on the Candidates page. Filter candidates based on their distance from a selected company location. Simply choose whether you want to see people "less than" or "more than" a certain distance away. In the Job view, you can filter candidates by their distance from either a specific job location or any job location associated with that role.

### Choose when to use it

Every company and every job can have different demands. That’s why you can choose to collect location on a per-job basis in the application settings. This gives you the flexibility to get exactly the information you need for each role.

We hope you and your candidates will love this update!

❤️ / The Product Team

Check out some more articles that may be of interest!

### Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖

### Build custom Analytics reports using AI ✨

### Teamtailor Co-pilot can now edit text your way ✨

- May 28, 2026Every Teamtailor career site works seamlessly with AI agents like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Comet, so candidates can find your jobs wherever they search.
- May 25, 2026Just describe the chart you want, and Co-pilot generates it for you.
- Apr 14, 2026Teamtailor's Co-pilot helps you refine text directly in the Job Editor. Apply quick editing actions, or use custom prompts to tailor your job ads.

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

title: Remotive | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Remotive | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Integraatiomme tuovat supervoimaa rekrytointiisi

## Remotive

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role.

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role. For promotion at no cost, the remotive team curates remote jobs ad-hoc, picking relevant jobs to highlight depending on our audience needs and our editorial schedules. Note that your jobs won't be posted by default, we can only guarantee the publication of paid jobs.
